SEARCH

所有类和接口

类
类
说明
ApplicationRecord
Application aggregate model for review workflow.
ApplicationReviewService
Core application review business service.
ConsoleApp
Console menu implementation for MO review module.
ConsolePrinter
ANSI color helper for console output.
DataRepository
Repository for file-based data loading and writing.
JobRecord
Job posting model.
Main
Main entry point of Application Review console app.
ReviewRecord
Review history item.
SimpleJson
Minimal JSON parser/writer based on Java SE only.
TaProfile
TA profile model.
